case_title: NARENDRA SHARMA VS. BALVANT PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-25-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHARMA, NARENDRA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, BALVANT AKA BOB PATEL CHANDNI, INC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-09-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-09-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-26-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-09-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-25-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S), AND PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. ***NOTE: IF THERE IS NO PROOF OF SERVICE, ANSWER OR DEFAULT AS TO DEFENDANT(S), AND IF OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS ARE NOT PAID BY THE JUN-25-2013 SHOW CAUSE HEARING, THE COURT INTENDS TO DISMISS THIS MATTER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-23-2013 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST NARENDRA SHARMA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-23-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-08-2013. ***NOTE: SANCTIONS PREVIOUSLY ISSUED TO NARENDRA SHARMA IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE MAR-05-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ARE ALSO DUE. TOTAL AMOUNT DUE $800.00.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST NARENDRA SHARMA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-05-2013, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-22-2013. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-05-2013 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JUN-25-2013 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
